people.spike: Academic anchor of the AI-Scientists cluster. “Can LLMs Generate Novel Research Ideas?” (ICLR 2025, Nature News, 507 cites) + Ideation–Execution Gap (ICLR 2026, Science). FutureHouse intern. Bridges rekursiv (T0) + Tanishq Kumar (Hashimoto co-advisee).

people.name: Siddharth Karamcheti
people.role: Incoming GT Asst Prof · Stanford CS PhD (Liang + Sadigh) · OpenVLA
people.spike: Academic / VLA anchor of the robotics cluster. OpenVLA co-author (2,682 cites, 6.3K★ — the open VLA standard vs π-0 / RT-2) + 1st-author Voltron (RSS 2023). Incoming Asst Prof, Georgia Tech, Fall 2026 — T2: not founding now, but professor-founder optionality (Finn/Levine → Physical Intelligence). Bridges Kushal Kedia / Ritvik Singh / Himanshu Gaurav Singh + Tanishq Kumar (Liang).

people.name: Tanishq Kumar
people.role: 1st-year Stanford CS PhD (Sep 2025), co-advised by Percy Liang + Tatsu Hashimoto. Harvard math ’25 (Pehlevan + Bordelon stat-physics group, Kempner Institute)
people.spike: 6 ICLR/ICML papers BEFORE starting PhD: Grokking (ICLR 24, 1st, 109 cites) + No Free Prune (ICML 24, co-1st w/ Sellke) + Scaling Laws for Precision (ICLR 2025 Oral, co-1st, 112 cites) + Do Mice Grok (ICLR 25, 1st) + Overtrained LMs (SCOPE Outstanding + ICBINB Best Paper at ICLR 25, 4th of 8 w/ Springer + Goyal + Wen + Aditi). Already ICLR 2026 1st-author Speculative Speculative Decoding w/ Tri Dao 9 months into PhD. 313 cites, h-5. 3 co-authorships with Aditi Raghunathan (CMU bridge). Co-author w/ Niklas Muennighoff (reference class) + Chris Ré + Benjamin Spector. Reference class: Niklas Muennighoff — pre-PhD prolific-publisher archetype. Indian-origin (Tanishq Mathew Kumar). Boarding school London → SF gap year → Harvard. Recursive from Aditi Raghunathan. T2
tags: spike: ICLR 2025 Oral (Scaling Laws for Precision) + SCOPE Outstanding + 5+ pre-PhD ICLR/ICML papers + Liang+Hashimoto co-advising

people.name: Chenfeng Xu
people.role: Incoming Asst Prof, UT Austin CS (Fall 2026). Researcher @ Together AI. Berkeley PhD ’25 (Keutzer + Tomizuka)
people.spike: 2 Best Papers at MLSys 2026 in one week: LEANN (97% storage, w/ Yichuan Wang + SkyLab) + StreamDiffusionV2 (58.28 FPS @ 14B on 4xH100, w/ Song Han + Agrawala + Keutzer). Aurora ICML 2026 project co-lead w/ Xiaoxia Wu + Junxiong Wang — Together’s RL speculative decoding. I-DLM + Squeeze Evolve (97.5% ARC-AGI) w/ Tri Dao. 8,573 cites, h-29. Qualcomm Innovation Fellow ’24. Bridges 4 repo clusters: Keutzer (Tiwari), Tri Dao (Wang+Hwang+Mishra), SkyLab, Song Han. Chinese-origin. T2
tags: spike: 2 MLSys 2026 Best Papers in 1 week + Aurora ICML 2026 + Together AI co-lead + UT Austin AP

people.spike: ICML 2025 Outstanding Paper (Roll the dice, Nagarajan et al.) + ICLR 25 SCOPE Outstanding + ICLR 25 Oral (Scaling Laws for Precision). 2026 Sloan Fellow + Schmidt AI2050 + NSF CAREER + Okawa. 21,885 cites, h-34. Network hub: Sachin Goyal → Anthropic. Vaishnavh Nagarajan (IIT Madras ’15) → DeepMind. Tanishq Kumar → Stanford Liang. Christina Baek + Springer + Ghosal final-stretch. Indian. T2
